body: return render(json: cached[:body], status: cached[:status]) if cached
Rails.cache.write([:idem, key], { body: response.body, status: response.status }, expires_in: 24.hours)
methods: %i[get post put patch delete options head],
def self.success(value) = new(success: true, value: value)
def self.failure(error) = new(success: false, error: error)
